definitions: 毁灭性的；破坏极大的；造成严重后果的

examples.text: Maintaining a balanced water level is essential to avoid dehydration or over-hydration, both of which can have devastating effects on overall health.
examples.explanation: 这里的 devastating effects 指“对整体健康造成毁灭性/极其严重的影响”。句子强调：脱水和水分过多这两种情况都会严重损害健康。

source.text: What would happen if you didn’t drink water? - Mia Nacamulli
